intro: Build small image pipelines by dragging nodes and wiring them Source → … → Output. Each challenge checks your Output against the goal.

challenges.title: See in grayscale
challenges.goal: Color images are 3 channels (R,G,B). Many CV steps work on a single brightness channel. Add a Grayscale node between the Image and the Output.
hints: Drag a 'Grayscale' node onto the canvas (Color group in the palette).
Wire it up: Image Source → Grayscale → Output (drag from the green dots).

challenges.title: Black & white mask
challenges.goal: Turn the photo into a clean black-and-white mask using Otsu thresholding (it picks the cutoff for you). Pipeline: Image → Threshold (Otsu) → Output.

challenges.title: Find the edges
challenges.goal: Detect edges with Canny using the default thresholds (50 / 150). Pipeline: Image → Canny Edges → Output.
hints: Wire: Image Source → Canny Edges → Output.

challenges.title: Clean edges (blur first)
challenges.goal: Raw edge detection is noisy. Blur first to calm it down, THEN detect edges. Pipeline: Image → Gaussian Blur (k=5) → Canny Edges (50/150) → Output.
hints: Drag a 'Gaussian Blur' node and a 'Canny Edges' node.
Wire them in order: Image Source → Gaussian Blur → Canny Edges → Output.
